instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall estimate drivetrain load for shift optimization.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall calculate transmission load using engine torque and vehicle speed.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Torque AND Vehicle_Speed AVAILABLE THEN Calculate_Transmission_Load

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall use throttle input for load estimation.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall include throttle position in load estimation algorithm.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall adjust shift logic based on load estimation.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall delay upshift when estimated load exceeds configured limit.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect excessive drivetrain load.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall trigger protection logic when load exceeds safety threshold.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall estimate load during acceleration.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall calculate load using vehicle acceleration and engine torque.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall use gear ratio for load estimation.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall adjust load estimation based on gear ratio.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disable load estimation during fault conditions.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall deactivate load estimation when system fault occurs.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall monitor load estimation state.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall record diagnostic data during load estimation operation.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect load estimation faults.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect fault when load estimation logic fails.

L4_requirements: IF Load_Estimation_Error = TRUE THEN Load_Estimation_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall update load estimation periodically.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall refresh estimated load value at configured interval.
